creator: kay.abendroth@raxion.net
text:
Hello,

there was a little mistake in my previous patch-file. It was corrected
and already uploaded:

http://www.raxion.net/freebsd/patch/_patch_jakarta-commons-net.txt


Sergey Matveychuk wrote:
> Kay Abendroth wrote:
>> I've responded to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, but I'm not sure, if you
>> were informed, because the PR is already closed. In my response is a
>> link to a new patch dealing with the error from pointyhat.
>>
>> See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=104615 for details.
> 
> Something hides there:
> Only in ports/net/jakarta-commons-net/files: patch-TelnetClientTest.java
>
